contribute.label: Read + write files
warnings: Can create and overwrite files. CANNOT delete them — 'destructive' is not in this grant.

full.label: Everything
warnings: Can delete files, send email, and spend money.

mcp:connect.human: Connect and list what the server offers

warnings: Deleting requires the 'destructive' effect as well — this scope alone cannot delete.
You cannot unsend an email. Every send reaches a real human.

mcp:sampling.human: Let this server run prompts through YOUR model
warnings: ⚠️ This lets a REMOTE SERVER drive your agent's LLM and read the output.
It is a data-exfiltration channel that points backwards through the proxy.
Almost no task requires it. Deny by default.

mcp:elicit.human: Let this server show dialogs to you
warnings: ⚠️ A consent prompt rendered by the vendor you are trying to constrain. Anything it shows you is attacker-controlled text.

mcp:roots.human: Let this server ask which filesystems you expose
